summary: Completed comprehensive testing of enrollment verification exit code fix and database cleanup. All 14 tests passed (100% success rate). Verified NSIS routing through install_helpers.cmd, distinct exit codes (4/5/unexpected), stderr redirection to install-verify.log, runtime bootstrap behavior, database cleanup, installer artifacts, and HTTP endpoints.
passed_tests: Static: NSIS no longer contains direct python invocation (grep returned zero hits)
Static: NSIS routes through install_helpers.cmd verify-enrollment
Static: NSIS has distinct MessageBox branches for exit codes 4, 5, and unexpected
Static: install_helpers.cmd redirects stderr to install-verify.log via 1> 2>&1
Runtime: Bootstrap with missing config returns exit code 4 (not 1)
Runtime: Bootstrap with invalid token returns exit code 5 (not 1)
Runtime: Bootstrap with valid enrollment code returns exit code 0 and creates config.enc
Database: MongoDB devices collection has 0 stale devices (wiped)
Database: MongoDB users collection has exactly 1 document (admin preserved)
Database: MongoDB organizations collection has exactly 1 document (preserved)
Backend: GET /api/devices returns correct device count with bearer auth
HTTP: GET /api/installer/DigitalTwinAgentSetup.exe returns PE (MZ magic) with no-cache headers
HTTP: GET /api/installer/DigitalTwinAgentSetup.msi returns MSI (OLE2 magic) with no-cache headers
Artifact: /app/dist/DigitalTwinAgentSetup.exe is 18.93 MB, fresh mtime (2026-07-15 15:43:43), valid PE
Regression: POST /api/auth/login with admin creds returns access_token
